div.div:
4000 = Solicitudes AlphaWeb
4001 = Check-In / Resultados
4010 = AMS Results
4066 = AMS SendLabRequest
4607 = AMS Bucket
5031 = AlphaWeb ToLabsis (bucket)
5032 = AlphaWeb FromLab (bucket)
8080 = LABSIS REST API
8091 = AlphaWeb Puerto Interfaz

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 205, 210), rgb(85, 42, 46)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(198, 40, 40), rgb(255, 145, 145));

div.div:
TROUBLESHOOTING:
1. Revisar spring.log de la interfaz afectada
2. Verificar carpeta error/ por HL7 rechazados
3. Confirmar proceso Java corriendo
4. Validar conectividad endpoint REST LABSIS
5. Verificar credenciales AMS1
6. Verificar puertos con netstat
